name: Tailored Wool Blazer
description: A masterclass in modern tailoring. Crafted from premium responsibly sourced wool with precise architectural lines and padded shoulders.

name: Slim Fit Trousers
description: Refined slim-fit trousers with a sharp crease. The perfect foundation for any sophisticated wardrobe.

name: Silk Button-Up Shirt
description: Luxurious silk shirt with a relaxed collar and mother-of-pearl buttons. Effortlessly elegant for day or evening.

name: Cashmere Turtleneck
description: Ultra-soft cashmere turtleneck with a fine-gauge knit. A timeless layering essential.

name: Linen Wide-Leg Pants
description: Effortless wide-leg pants in premium linen. Breezy silhouette perfect for warm-weather dressing.

name: Merino Crew Neck Sweater
description: Fine merino wool crew neck with a clean finish. Versatile and breathable for year-round wear.

name: Pleated Mid Skirt
description: A graceful mid-length skirt with knife pleats that move beautifully. Feminine yet structured.

name: Relaxed Linen Blazer
description: An unstructured linen blazer with a relaxed silhouette. The perfect summer layering piece.

name: Silk Blend Camisole
description: A delicate silk camisole with adjustable spaghetti straps and a satin finish.

name: Wool Wide Leg Trousers
description: Dramatic wide-leg trousers in a luxe wool blend. Architectural volume meets refined tailoring.

name: Cotton Poplin Shirt
description: Crisp cotton poplin shirt with a classic collar and barrel cuffs. A wardrobe foundation.

name: Leather Biker Jacket
description: A sleek leather biker jacket with asymmetrical zip closure. Edgy yet sophisticated.

name: Structured Wool Coat
description: Tailored from premium Italian wool blend, this structured coat features sharp shoulders, an oversized fit, and tonal button closures.

name: Oversized Trench Coat
description: An oversized take on the classic trench coat. Crafted from water-resistant cotton gabardine with storm flaps.

name: Classic Peacoat
description: A double-breasted peacoat in heavyweight wool. Nautical heritage meets modern minimalism.

name: Quilted Down Jacket
description: Lightweight quilted down jacket with a matte finish. Technical warmth without bulk.

name: Long Cashmere Coat
description: A floor-length cashmere coat with a relaxed cut. The ultimate luxury statement piece.

name: Rain Parka
description: A minimalist rain parka with sealed seams and an adjustable hood. Functional design meets clean lines.

name: Shearling Bomber
description: A luxurious shearling bomber jacket with a relaxed fit and rich texture.

name: Lightweight Mac Coat
description: A lightweight mac coat in water-repellent cotton. The perfect transitional piece.

name: Leather Ankle Boots
description: Minimalist ankle boots crafted from calfskin leather with a pointed toe and sculptural block heel.

name: Pointed Toe Pumps
description: Classic pointed toe pumps with a sleek stiletto heel. Timeless elegance.

name: Minimal Leather Loafer
description: Sleek leather loafers with a clean silhouette and premium calfskin.

name: Knee-High Leather Boot
description: Statement knee-high boots in supple calfskin leather with a low block heel.

name: Leather Mules
description: Sculptural leather mules with a curved block heel. Artisanal flair with modern comfort.

name: Platform Oxfords
description: Chunky platform oxfords with a lug sole. A contemporary take on a classic silhouette.

name: Slide Sandals
description: Minimalist leather slide sandals with a sculpted footbed. Understated summer luxury.

name: Chelsea Boots
description: Sleek Chelsea boots in polished leather with elastic side panels. An everyday essential.

name: Minimalist Leather Tote
description: A sleek, minimalist leather handbag crafted from premium full-grain leather with clean lines.

name: Sculptural Hoops
description: Thick sculptural hoop earrings with a polished high-shine finish.

name: Mini Structured Tote
description: A sleek, structured mini tote in matte black leather with minimal hardware.

name: Chain Link Belt
description: A chunky chain link belt with a polished buckle. Defines the waist with architectural precision.

name: Woven Leather Belt
description: A hand-woven leather belt in soft calfskin. Artisanal craftsmanship meets everyday wear.

name: Silk Twilly Scarf
description: A versatile silk twilly scarf with hand-rolled edges. Wear as a necktie, bag handle wrap, or hair accessory.

name: Leather Card Holder
description: A slim card holder in pebbled leather with three card slots. Minimalist design for essential carry.

name: Gold Signet Ring
description: A substantial gold signet ring with a polished face. A modern heirloom piece.

name: Oversized Cashmere Scarf
description: An oversized cashmere scarf with fringed ends. Wraps in infinite ways for cozy luxury.

name: Leather Crossbody Bag
description: A compact crossbody bag in textured leather with an adjustable strap. Hands-free elegance.

name: Luxe Ceramic Cup
description: A minimalist matte black ceramic cup with clean geometric lines.

name: Scented Candle Set
description: A set of three hand-poured soy wax candles in ceramic vessels. Notes of fig, cedar, and amber.

name: Stoneware Dinner Plate
description: Artisanal stoneware dinner plates with a reactive glaze finish. Each piece is unique.

name: Linen Throw Blanket
description: A pure linen throw blanket with fringed ends. Lightweight yet warm for year-round use.

name: Marble Coaster Set
description: A set of four marble coasters with cork backing. Natural stone, each with unique veining.

name: Minimalist Vase
description: A sculptural ceramic vase with an organic silhouette. A statement piece for any surface.

name: Wool Throw Pillow
description: A textured wool pillow with a hidden zip closure. Adds warmth and dimension.

name: Glass Decanter
description: A hand-blown glass decanter with a stopper. Functional art for your bar cart.

name: Bamboo Serving Board
description: A large bamboo serving board with a juice groove. Perfect for charcuterie and entertaining.

name: Cotton Percale Sheets
description: Premium cotton percale sheet set with a crisp, cool hand feel. The benchmark of quality bedding.
